allowed_claims: BHSM has frozen internal prediction artifacts.
BHSM has an offline Python computational interface.
BHSM has a prediction registry and CLI.
BHSM has provenance-tracked artifact adapters where local sources support them.
BHSM has a symbolic CP O_int field/action candidate with an open production theorem.
unsupported_claims: validated FeynRules, UFO, or MadGraph readiness

standalone production interaction proved by CP holonomy alone
production readiness of the symbolic CP O_int candidate
